arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti reacts to Kylian Mbappe's omission from France squad
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has hinted that France's decision not to call up Kylian Mbappe for October international due was influenced by Real Madrid's medical staff. Addressing the decision made by Deschamps, Madrid manager Ancelotti has hinted that the club's medical staff recommended that he rests during the international break, despite passing him fit to feature this week in La Liga.
The brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid are reportedly keeping a close eye on the development of Nico Paz, at Como. Youngster Paz, for his part, secured a departure…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid offer unusual solution to Santiago Bernabeu soundproofing problems
arts.sum: Recently, Real Madrid announced that they have been forced to postpone all concerts that were due to take place at the Santiago Bernabeu up until March 2025. The reason for this is that the club was found to have committed violations in relation to the stadium’s soundproofing. Several residents complaints of the soundproofing problem during […] The post Real Madrid offer unusual solution to Santiago Bernabeu soundproofing problems appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Villarreal 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Villarreal visit the Santiago Bernabeu in what should be a monumental LaLiga game. Venue : Estadio Santiago Bernabeu, Madrid, Spain.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted XI vs Villarreal: Kylian Mbappe to start while Éder Militão is rested
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to take on Villarreal on Saturday evening as they look to get back on track after a demoralising defeat against Lille in midweek European action. The…

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye bid for Wharton; Real Madrid's plan to sign Alexander-Arnold revealed
arts.sum: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid are interested in signing Thomas Partey once his contract expires in summer 2025. Arsenal are plotting a move for 18-year-old Barcelona starlet Arnau Pradas .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Villarreal, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted XI: Lunin, Carvajal, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Mendy, Camavinga, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe. Rodrygo and Mbappe will likely return to the starting lineup, while Tchouameni could be deployed as a center-back in order to give Militao the chance to rest.

arts.ttl: Power Rankings: The best teams in Europe
arts.sum: Real Madrid's shock defeat to LOSC Lille and Bayern Munich's equally shocking 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa grabbed most of the column space, while some was also saved for Juventus's dramatic win over RB Leipzig too. Borussia Dortmund earn a spot in the rankings this week thanks to their thumping 7-1 win over an in-form Celtic side in the Champions League in midweek.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Villarreal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid are aiming to close the gap on Clasico rivals Barcelona on Saturday when they face Villarreal in La Liga. Los Blancos had made an unbeaten start to the new season until a surprise defeat to French outfit Lille in the Champions League midweek.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid slayer emerges as leading striker candidate for Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona are expected to look for a new striker from 2025 onwards. Robert Lewandowski is coming towards the end of his career, and considering that he is 36, he can no longer be relied upon to be the club’s undisputed starting striker over the course of a season.
